toast.dashboardResetSuccess: Dashboard text reset to defaults for {locale}.
toast.entryMissing: Widget text entry is not ready yet.
toast.googleFailed: Google Calendar connection failed. Check your Google OAuth settings.
toast.connectZoomFailed: Could not start Zoom connection. Check ZOOM_CLIENT_ID in .env and your Zoom Marketplace app.

dashboard.setupTitle: Add booking widget to your storefront
dashboard.setupStep1: Create at least one active service and meeting type in the admin.
dashboard.setupStep2Middle: block to a page, or enable
dashboard.setupStep3: Save the theme and preview your storefront.

setupGuide.title: Setup guide
setupGuide.subtitle: Welcome to Appointment Booking. Let's get your store ready to accept appointments.

services.title: Create your first service
services.description: Add at least one active service that customers can book. Set the duration and description so visitors know what they're scheduling.

linkMeetingTypes.title: Add meeting types to a service
linkMeetingTypes.description: Choose which meeting options (in-store, phone, video, and more) are available for each service.

availability.title: Review your availability
availability.description: Confirm your weekly hours, closed dates, and booking windows match when you can take appointments.

widgetTheme.title: Install the booking widget on your theme
widgetTheme.description: Add the Appointment Booking block to a page, or enable the Appointment Booking Embed under App embeds — use one placement, not both.

widgetAppearance.title: Customize widget appearance
widgetAppearance.description: Match the booking widget to your brand with theme style, colors, and storefront text.

languages.title: Configure storefront languages
languages.description: Translate widget text and sync languages so customers see booking copy in their locale.

firstBooking.title: Receive your first booking
firstBooking.description: Once the widget is live, customers can schedule appointments. You'll see new bookings here and in the Bookings page.

dashboard.quickSetupSubtitle: Configure your booking flow before going live.
dashboard.quickSetupSettingsDesc: Storefront theme, languages, and widget appearance.
dashboard.quickSetupServicesDesc: Create bookable services customers can choose from.
dashboard.quickSetupAvailabilityDesc: Working hours, closed dates, and booking windows.
dashboard.quickSetupMeetingTypesDesc: In-store, phone, video, and custom meeting options.
dashboard.quickSetupBookingsDesc: View, manage, and track customer appointments.
dashboard.integrationsAllConnected: Google Calendar and Zoom are connected.
dashboard.integrationsPartialConnected: One integration is connected. Open Settings to connect the rest.
dashboard.integrationsNoneConnected: Connect Google Calendar and Zoom in Settings for video bookings and calendar sync.
dashboard.integrationLockedMessage: Available on Pro. Upgrade in Billing to connect Zoom or Google Calendar.
dashboard.googleCalendarDesc: Create calendar events automatically when bookings are confirmed.
dashboard.zoomDesc: Create Zoom meetings automatically for video call bookings.
dashboard.emptyBookings: No bookings yet. Add the booking widget to your storefront theme to start accepting appointments.

services.addSubtitle: Create a bookable service for your storefront.
services.viewSubtitle: Preview how this service appears to customers.
services.sectionMeetingTypesHint: Choose how customers can meet for this service.
services.sectionTranslationsHint: Translate this service for other storefront languages.
services.noMeetingTypesCreateFirst: No meeting types yet — create them first.
services.customBookingRulesHint: Configure how and when this service can be booked.
services.bookingRulesIncompleteHint: Set a meeting duration before you can save this service.

meetingTypes.summaryLinkBefore: Link types to services on the
meetingTypes.emptyText: Create how customers can meet you — video call, phone, in-store, or custom.
meetingTypes.descriptionPlaceholder: Shown on the booking widget card
meetingTypes.enableVideoHintConnected: Sends a Zoom or Google Meet link after booking, depending on which integration you connected.
meetingTypes.enableVideoHintDisconnected: Connect Zoom or Google Calendar first. Video links are only available after an integration is connected.
meetingTypes.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? If bookings exist for this type, it will be deactivated instead.
meetingTypes.connectIntegrationsFirst: Connect Google Calendar or Zoom under Integrations before enabling video links.
meetingTypes.goToDashboardAfter: to connect Zoom or Google Calendar, then return here to enable video links.
meetingTypes.deactivateInstead: Cannot delete — {count} booking(s) use this type. It was deactivated instead.
meetingTypes.sectionDetailsHint: Name, subtitle, description, image, and video settings.
meetingTypes.sectionTranslationsHint: Translate this meeting type for other storefront languages.
meetingTypes.addSubtitle: Create a new way for customers to meet you.

settings.languagesDesc: Manage storefront widget text and admin app copy for your store.
settings.storeLanguagesDesc: Manage widget text for each language on your storefront.
settings.dashboardLanguagesDesc: Customize navigation, buttons, and labels inside this app.
settings.storefrontAppearanceDesc: Choose how the booking widget looks on your storefront.
settings.themeClassicDesc: Elegant serif headings, refined borders, and a jewelry-showroom feel.
settings.themeModernDesc: Bold sans-serif type, rounded cards, and soft shadows for a clean look.
settings.integrationsDesc: Connect Google Calendar and Zoom for video bookings and calendar sync.

bookingRules.title: Booking rules
bookingRules.desc: Control how and when meetings can be booked.
bookingRules.meetingIntervalTip:
Controls how often booking slots are shown.
For a 30-min meeting:
• Choose 1 hr to show slots at the top of each hour.
• Choose 30 min to show slots every 30 min.
bookingRules.meetingDurationTip: How long this appointment lasts. You can set minutes or hours.
bookingRules.minNoticeTip: Require users to book meetings at least this much time in advance.
bookingRules.dateRangeTip: Set how far into the future bookings can be made from today’s date.
bookingRules.dateRangeEmptyTip: Leave empty to allow bookings from today through the end of next month.
bookingRules.preBufferTip: Time to block before each meeting, allowing for extra time to prepare.
bookingRules.postBufferTip: Time to block after each meeting, allowing for extra time to wrap up.
bookingRules.maxPerDayTip: Limit total bookings per day. Use 0 for no limit.
bookingRules.maxPerSlotTip: How many customers can book the same time slot.
bookingRules.lookBusyTip: Hide a percentage of available slots so your calendar looks fuller.
bookingRules.lookBusyHint: Hide the number of available slots by x%.
bookingRules.serviceDurationNoteBefore: Slot length uses each service’s duration on the
bookingRules.serviceDurationNoteAfter: page. The default duration above applies when creating new services.

billing.draftNotice: Plan changes open Shopify's hosted pricing page. If you see a 404, your app listing may still be in draft — assign the private shopify-test plan to this store in Partner Dashboard, or publish the app listing first.

languages.supportedHelp: Widget copy is stored in the Shopify metaobject {metaobjectName}. Use {sync} to load built-in text, or {edit} in Translate & Adapt.
languages.noLocalesDefault: No published store languages found. Add languages in Shopify admin.
languages.provisionRetry: Re-open Settings after approving scopes if this persists.
languages.dashboardLanguageFieldDescription: Display name for this entry (set automatically from your Admin language).
languages.dashboardLanguagesNotice: App copy is stored in the {metaobjectName} metaobject and follows your Shopify Admin language ({locale}). Edit fields in Shopify or reset to built-in defaults.
languages.dashboardEditHint: In each field, edit only the text in quotes. Keep JSON keys unchanged.

banner.unsyncedMessage: Widget text is not synced for store languages: {names}. Open Settings to sync translations.

catalog.missingTranslationsBanner: {metaobjectName} is missing translations for: {names}. Save each item, then use Edit translation below.
catalog.translationsHelp: Copy is stored in the Shopify metaobject {metaobjectName}. Use {edit} in Translate & Adapt for each store language.
catalog.translationsAllSynced: All store languages are synced for this item.
catalog.translationsStepSave: Save this form to update the default language text.
catalog.translationsStepTranslate: Click Edit translation to open Translate & Adapt for each language.
catalog.translationsPrimaryHint: Updated when you save the form above.
catalog.saveToCreateEntry: Save this item first to create its translation entry.
